---
title: 'TC&amp;C Color Scheme Save as Draft'
date: '2018-02-01T16:59:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '1350316803321923830'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
---

The TC&amp;C Color Scheme<br /><br />Page<br /><br /><div><ul><li>Beige Background</li><ul><li>#cbb48b</li><li>#7a6b51</li></ul><li>Blue Text</li><ul><li>#04085b</li></ul></ul></div><div>Header</div><div><ul><li>Header Blue&nbsp;#04085b</li><li>Description Blue&nbsp;#0b1194</li><li>Tabs</li><ul><li>Tab Text Blue&nbsp;#0b1194</li><li>Tab Text Selected Red&nbsp;#990000</li><li>Tab Background Color&nbsp;#cbb48b</li><li>Tab Background Selected&nbsp;#7a6b51</li><li>Tab Background Border/Bevel&nbsp;#94766e</li></ul></ul></div><div>Posts</div><div><ul><li>Post Title Text&nbsp;#610a0a</li><li>Post Background &nbsp;#fefcfc</li><li>Border/Bevel &nbsp;#bc5825</li></ul></div><div>Alternate Light Red/Orange&nbsp;#994215</div><div><br /></div><div>Links</div><div><ul><li>Link</li><ul><li>Dark Red #990000</li></ul><li>Visited</li><ul><li>Blue #0b1194</li></ul><li>Hover</li><ul><li>Gold #f1c232</li></ul></ul></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div>
